info.name: Tenant Dashboard
info.description: Tenant dashboard API — authentication, profile, roles, comments, notifications, and modules (POS, Sales, Inventory, HR, Surveys, Accounting, Expenses, Email/SMS Marketing, Email, Static Pages, Tickets).

item.name: Tenant Auth & Profile
item.description: Tenant authentication, profile, sessions, and dashboard. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Comments
item.description: Comment system with replies, reactions, and threading. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification system with push subscriptions and preferences. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Payment Processing
item.description: Payment authorization, capture, void, refund. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Tenant Routes
item.description: Tenant-scoped API routes. Requires auth:api + tenant_roles middleware.

item.name: modules
item.description: Tenant modules — POS, Sales, Inventory, HR, Surveys, Accounting, Expenses, Email Marketing, SMS Marketing, Email, Static Pages, Tickets.

item.name: Surveys
item.description: Survey builder module — creation, responses, analytics, sharing.

item.name: Accounting
item.description: Accounting module API - Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, Fiscal Years, Budgets, Tax Rates, Bank Accounts, Reports

item.name: Expenses
item.description: Expenses module API - Categories, Expenses, Reports, Policies, Tags, Reimbursements

item.name: Email Marketing
item.description: Email Marketing module API - Campaigns, Templates, Contacts, Contact Lists, Credentials, Automation, Webhooks, A/B Tests, Import, Sending Logs, Unsubscribes

item.name: SMS Marketing
item.description: SMS Marketing module API - Campaigns, Templates, Contacts, Contact Lists, Credentials, Automation, Webhooks, A/B Tests, Import, Sending Logs, Opt-Outs

item.name: Email (Module)
item.description: Email templates and SMTP configuration. Requires auth:api.

item.name: Static Pages (Public)
item.description: Public static pages API — no auth required.

item.name: Tickets (Module)
item.description: Full ticket management with kanban, assignment, metrics. Requires auth:api.
